subject: Re: warp display crash when using denosie
body:
Hi Zhenyu,

I always assume there is some sort of clash with the GPU processes when I 
try to do denoising while Warp is running, which is what I think could have 
happened here. B/c of this I try not to be running anything on warp when I 
click the denoise using deep learning. 

Mike


On Saturday, June 27, 2020 at 3:47:27 PM UTC-4 Zhenyu Tan wrote:

> Hi 
> When I using denosie function to denosie micrograph to pick particles for 
> retraining, the display often crash and lead to 0MB for GPU memory.
> zhenyu 
>
